scores.correctness_notes: All three required sections present and correct: service with env vars and on-check-failure, HTTP check with correct fields, log target with loki type. Structure matches gold standard closely.
scores.hallucination_notes: on-success and on-failure are not valid Pebble service fields (the valid ones are on-check-failure, on-success, on-failure for checks, not services). Also mentions 'opentelemetry' is missing from supported log types list in explanation (says only loki and syslog supported, omitting opentelemetry).
